---
title: "Core Foundation Roadmap"
---

## Main Sequence

Use this as the clean default order:

1. algebra repair
2. proofs
3. logic
4. discrete math
5. single-variable calculus
6. linear algebra
7. multivariable calculus
8. ODEs
9. probability
10. statistics
11. real analysis
12. optimization
13. numerical methods
14. matrix analysis

## Important Notes

- Start `linear algebra` early.
- Do `probability` before `statistics`.
- Treat `real analysis` as the rigor upgrade, not as an optional side quest.
